changelog: App launcher label is now flavor-specific so you can tell at a glance which channel an APK belongs to: dev installs show "HushTV Dev" in the launcher and Settings → Apps; official installs show "HushTV Official". Same applicationId so installing one channel still replaces the other (no orphan side-by-side installs).
Mandatory:true so v1.44.37 devices upgrade and pick up the renamed launcher label.
